authority: V45 composes V44 connected cycle-to-One descent with V38's complete boundary-axis coordinate grammar; it retains every distinct fixed point and does not choose from target measurements.

composition.connected_parent: all three sealed V42 connected whole-chain rows
composition.cycle_relation: V44 exact connected cycle-distance descent to the theorem-forced One
composition.coordinate_relation: V38 complete crossing of both chain boundaries and both dihedral-axis orders
composition.update_space: all 24 lattice values at every active coordinate
composition.termination: strict finite fixed point after a complete unchanged sweep

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V42 supplies every connected parent, V44 supplies connected cycle-to-One descent, and V38 supplies the complete boundary-axis coordinate grammar.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: Each of three parents executes both chain boundaries, both dihedral-axis orders and all 24 values at every active coordinate until a complete sweep changes no coordinate.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Neither the connected parent frontier nor the boundary-axis grammar alone supplies their complete twelve-trace Cartesian cross.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Connectivity is invariant; exact integer cycle distance to One precedes the unchanged V3 total order within every independently executed coordinate order.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Only sealed admitted relations, sequence and generated geometry enter; native coordinates, TM, dRMSD and mask measurements are absent.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Runtime halts on parent, source, axis, order, coverage, connectivity, monotonicity, fixed-point, target-input or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: The complete L76 fixed-point frontier is emitted and sealed before every retained structure is compared.
